description: Create a Codex pet run folder with per-state base + row prompts, retry prompts, layout-guide PNGs, an auto-selected chroma key, pet_request.json, and an imagegen job manifest (the deterministic scaffolding that drives downstream generation).
rules: local-only — writes a run folder under record_store; no image generation here (delegated to $imagegen)
PET_NAME is required; PET_NOTES and STYLE_PRESET (default auto) are optional; reference images are not handled by this porter (prompt-only path)
run folder + imagegen-jobs.json + pet_request.json + prompts + layout guides written under record_store/run
usage: Set PET_NAME (and optionally PET_NOTES, STYLE_PRESET). Output: run/imagegen-jobs.json plus run/pet_request.json, run/prompts/, run/references/layout-guides/.
limitation: Scaffolding only; does not call the image API. STYLE_PRESET must be one of the script's presets (auto/pixel/plush/clay/sticker/flat-vector/3d-toy/painterly/brand-inspired). Requires Pillow (PIL) to draw layout guides.
